amogh.name: Amogh Jayasimha
amogh.headline: Platform Engineer building reliable Kubernetes delivery systems, GitOps promotion pipelines, and failure-aware cloud platforms.
amogh.shortBio: I build platform systems that make risky production changes boring: faster deploys, safer promotions, better observability, and fewer failure surprises.
amogh.longBio: Amogh Jayasimha is a DevOps and Site Reliability engineer focused on Kubernetes platforms, GitOps delivery, and production hardening. His recent work spans GKE platform ownership, CI acceleration, stateful incident recovery, mTLS rollouts, policy-driven supply chain security, and a chaos-gated promotion pipeline that blocks production until the system survives live fault injection under load.
